purpose: Negative and mutation fixtures that verify the blind-spot probe itself can catch missing verifier coverage.

fixtures.expectedDetector: pack must define at least two task-specific blindSpotPatterns
fixtures.risk: A probe that never checks blind-spot pattern count can pass a shallow verifier forever.

fixtures.expectedDetector: pack must define sampleTasks for mutation regression
fixtures.risk: A probe without negative examples cannot prove the verifier catches known bad cases.

fixtures.expectedDetector: must detect at least one declared blind spot pattern
fixtures.risk: A sample task can exist but fail to exercise any actual blind-spot detector.
A generic verifier can route a task type without domain-specific checks.
The loop can detect a blind spot but lack a verifier-harness improvement path.
The verifier can find target defects but cannot route ownership for repair.
